caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his arm is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears a plain white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of him is a professional silver microphone held by a black shock mount; the mount features the white text " Rode" on its arm. Initially, the man is seen speaking with a focused expression, looking slightly off-camera. As the sequence progresses, he becomes more animated, beginning to gesture with his right hand. By the final moments, his hand moves rapidly across the frame in a blurred motion, coinciding with a change in his facial expression as he continues to speak.
